items.title: Enhance Midjourney API Usage Metadata in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the `getRecordMetadata()` function to Midjourney handlers, enriching API usage logs with essential fields such as mode, action, prompt, and resolution. Key changes include modifications to ephone and ttapi handlers to override metadata retrieval, ensuring that business-relevant information is captured effectively. This enhancement improves data tracking and analytics for API usage.

items.title: Enhance wcnb Metadata for Better Billing Clarity in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces essential metadata fields, `model` and `action`, to the wcnb worker's nano-banana billing logs. By implementing `getRecordMetadata()` and `getRecordRequestBody()` methods, the logs will now provide clearer insights into pricing tiers. This change improves the overall accuracy of billing records for wcnb requests.

items.title: Enhance Metadata Recording for Ankit Channel in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new method, `getRecordMetadata()`, to the `BaseHandler` class, ensuring that metadata such as `model` and `action` is recorded for the ankit channel. Previously, this information was missing due to the method not being called in `recordUsage()`. Now, all ttapi handlers that override this method will correctly log relevant metadata, improving the accuracy of API usage records.

items.title: Enhance OAuth Recovery Process in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update fixes the native loading text key and improves the OAuth flow by closing the auth panel and re-triggering the login process when deep-link token exchange fails. Additionally, if the user manually closes the in-app browser, the app will now fall back to the iframe login UI. These changes enhance user experience by preventing users from getting stuck on a loading screen.

items.title: Enhance Chat UI for Better Readability in Nexior ✨
items.summary: This update introduces a redesigned chat interface with softer message bubbles and improved spacing for enhanced readability. A new inline error card replaces the previous alert, integrating a Top Up action for user convenience. Additionally, the chat layout has been refined for clearer sidebar separation and improved mobile usability.

items.title: Enhance Seedance Billing Accuracy in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new method to extract command-line parameters from prompts, ensuring accurate billing for Seedance. Key changes include the prioritization of request body parameters over prompt parameters and the adoption of a new API format for sending metadata. The billing payload is now guaranteed to include essential fields like resolution and model, improving overall billing accuracy.

items.title: Improve error handling for user input in Platform Service 🎉
items.summary: This update classifies upstream 'Please try rephrasing' failures as `BadRequestError` instead of `ApiError`. The change is applied in both Suno upload polling and lyric generation polling flows, ensuring more accurate error reporting. This adjustment helps avoid misleading server error messages when user input needs modification.

items.title: Enhance Mobile OAuth with In-App Browser in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the mobile OAuth login process by implementing an in-app browser and deep link callbacks for Google and GitHub authentication. Key changes include modifications to Android and iOS configurations, ensuring a smoother user experience without the need for iframe popups. The integration of @capacitor/browser enhances security and usability for mobile users.

items.title: Enhance nano-banana error handling in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the classification of nano-banana image generation errors across all providers, ensuring that content moderation errors return the correct HTTP 403 status instead of a generic 500. Key changes include adding a handler for ForbiddenError, enhancing keyword detection in error messages, and preserving original error messages for better user feedback. These adjustments will lead to more meaningful error responses without impacting billing.

items.title: Enhance API Try-It Form with oneOf Support in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces support for OpenAPI's oneOf with discriminator in the API Try-It form, addressing issues where properties were rendered flat, leading to invalid payloads. Key changes include extending the ISchema interface and updating Form.vue to render a variant selector and handle branch-specific properties effectively.

items.title: Enhance error handling for Suno rephrasing requests in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new classification for errors returned by Suno when prompts are rejected due to vague requests. Specifically, it adds a BadRequestError (400) for messages indicating the need for more specific details. This change improves the clarity of error handling in both lyrics and audio generation paths.
